case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. ALEJANDRO ROSAS VILLA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSAS VILLA, ALEJANDRO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,640.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
